# ELEGOO Product Files

Put the official ELEGOO Conqueror Robot Tank Kit download here.

Suggested structure:

```text
vendor/elegoo/
  original-archive.zip
  extracted/
```

The source archive is useful for:

- Confirming motor, ultrasonic, line tracking, and IR pin mappings.
- Preserving the factory examples.
- Reusing known-good driver code where appropriate.
